details.description: Comprehensive cartographic map of EventStore API, Effect Layer infrastructure, test harness patterns, and dependency graph for Secretary+Binder+EventStore
sections: EventStore full API with line citations
Effect Layer composition patterns (5 canonical examples + effectDiscard + unwrap)

completed_sections: EventStore full API with DatabaseAdapter dependency graph
Effect Layer composition patterns (Layer.effect, Layer.effectDiscard, Layer.unwrap, Layer.mergeAll, Layer.succeed)
DatabaseAdapter persistence matrix (PGlite vs PostgreSQL vs DuckDB)
Existing test layer factories (testEffect, pgTestLayer, truth-closure mock)
Viable minimal test harness recipe (no database required)
key_findings: No live integration tests exist in test/campaign/ — only placeholder compile-checks
The sole mock EventStore implementation is in-source at src/campaign/truth-closure.test.ts:1191
Secretary.layer.pipe(Layer.provide(mockEventStoreLayer)) satisfies both Secretary and Binder in one step
EventStore has NO defaultLayer — only raw layer with unsatisfied DatabaseAdapter.Service requirement
test/preload.ts sets OPENCODE_DB=:memory: before any src import, defaulting all tests to PGlite
